elements.text:
You are invited to a Halloween party with your coworkers and you're only close to a couple of people there. You decide to wear a costume. When you arrive, everyone looks at you. 

Here are some behaviors that someone might do at that moment or in the future:

text: I want to throw this costume away and never think of tonight again, but then remember that my friend complimented me earlier on it.
I walk up to some friends and start a conversation.
I'll post a picture of myself in this costume because I look great.
I want to change into something else, but decide to wear what I came in.
